name: Holiday Chocolate Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Heat oven to 325°F. In a large mixing bowl, beat butter, sugar, egg, and vanilla until light and fluffy. Stir together flour, cocoa, baking powder, baking soda, and salt; add to butter mixture, blending well. On a lightly floured surface, roll small portions of dough into balls about 1/4-inch thick. Cut with a 2-1/2-inch cookie cutter; place on an ungreased baking sheet. Bake 5 to 7 minutes or until only a slight indentation remains when touched lightly. Cool for 1 minute on the baking sheet, then remove and transfer to a wire rack to cool completely. Prepare Decorator's Frosting (see below). Frost cookies and decorate as desired.
Decorator's Frosting:
In a small mixing bowl, combine all ingredients except red food coloring; beat until smooth and of spreading consistency. Tint with food coloring, blending well.
